name: supreme-coding-guidelines
description: The definitive .ah skill bundle for Claude Code. Combines extreme token compression, surgical coding behavior, disciplined diagnosis, TDD, and architectural control through the Teleological Semantic Format (.ah) created by David C. Cavalcante (originator of MAIC™, HIM™, and NHE™). Auto-discovers two skills from the skills/ directory: ah-parser (one-time bootstrap of the .ah grammar with three-mode output protocol) and supreme-coding-guidelines (always-on behavioral rules). User code is always preserved verbatim regardless of output mode.
